zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Fielding於大約1445年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯時，她的父親Sir William de Fielding-2歲，母親Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding16歲。她於1472年與Edward Hungerford在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾拉特比結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1507年10月20日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾恩維爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Fielding于大约1445年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾盧特沃斯时，她的父亲Sir William de Fielding-2岁，母亲Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding16岁。她于1472年与Edward Hungerford在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾拉特比结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1507年10月20日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾恩維爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fielding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occasionally from a Middle English survival of Old English felding ‘dweller in the field(s), open country’.
Irish: possibly a variant of McField (see McPhail ).

variants.name: Fielden
meanings: English: from a Middle English survival of the dative plural of Old English feld, denoting someone who lived ‘in the fields’. The lost district name Feldon in Warwickshire may be named with this word. Perhaps also a habitational name from Feldom in Marske, North Yorkshire, recorded as Feldon in 1231. See Field .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Fielding was born about 1445, in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir William de Fielding, was -2 and her mother, Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, was 16. She married Edward Hungerford in 1472, in Ratby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 20 October 1507, in Enville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Fielding est née environ 1445, à Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Fielding, avait -2 ans et sa mère, Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Hungerford en 1472, à Ratby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 20 octobre 1507, à Enville, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Fielding um 1445 in Lutterworth, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Fielding -2 und ihre Mutter Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding 16. Sie hat 1472 in Ratby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Edward Hungerford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 20. Oktober 1507 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Enville, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Fieldingが約1445年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアルッテルウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir William de Fieldingは-2歳，母Agnes De St Liz Aka Fieldingは16歳であった。1472年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアラトビーでEdward Hungerfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1507年10月20日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアエンヴィルで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Fielding(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 레이스스터실르 루터워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Fielding(은)는 -2세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 라트비에서 Edward Hungerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 10월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 빌에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Fielding nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Fielding, tinha -2 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Hungerford em 1472, em Ratby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1507, em Enville, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Fielding родилась около 1445 г. в местности луттирворт, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Fielding было -2 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Hungerford в 1472 г. в местности ратби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 20 октября 1507 г. в местности энвилл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Fielding nació aproximadamente 1445, en Lutterworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Fielding, tenía -2 años y su mamá, Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, tenía 16 años.
